text:
Once upon a time in the mystical forest of Eldoria, there lived a kind-hearted fairy named Qwen. She was known for her radiant wings and her ability to weave magic with light. One moonlit night, as the forest was bathed in a soft glow, a tiny, lost caterpillar stumbled upon Qwen's cozy home.

The poor little caterpillar, named Luna, had been wandering aimlessly in the dark forest. She was tired and scared, but when she saw Qwen, she felt a warm comfort. Qwen welcomed Luna into her home and took care of her, feeding her sweet nectar and telling her stories about the wonders of the forest.

As days passed, Luna began to grow stronger, and soon she transformed into a beautiful butterfly. Qwen was overjoyed and wished Luna all the best. But before leaving, Luna wanted to give something back to her friend. She gathered all the flowers from the garden and made them into a beautiful bouquet.
